review_title: Excellent UI Components with Great Documentation and Support
description: Overall, an excellent experience – Bryntum has significantly accelerated our development and improved the quality of our application. The combination of great documentation, solid architecture, and reliable support makes it a clear recommendation.
author: Thomas B.
pros: Bryntum is very easy to implement, well-documented, and offers many well-thought-out features that integrate seamlessly. Good structure of code. Support via the forum works very well in most cases and provides helpful answers. We are using Scheduler Pro / Calendar and the Grid.
cons: Upgrading to new versions can sometimes be a bit more involved, but in most cases, it works without major issues.

review_title: Flexible, high-quality OEM components with excellent partnership support
description: Our overall experience has been very positive. We were able to get our component built, integrated, and deployed quickly, and the support we received from the Bryntum team was excellent throughout. They were responsive, accommodating, and clearly invested in helping us succeed. The software itself performed as expected, was highly adaptable, and integrated smoothly with our product. We’re looking forward to expanding our use of Bryntum components in future iterations.
author: John K.
pros: The Bryntum team has been excellent to work with. They were highly flexible during our contracting process, allowing us to customize how we structured our license agreements and bundle multiple components rather than being limited to individual list-price items. This flexibility made the partnership feel very collaborative. From a technical standpoint, the first product we’ve implemented has been extremely customizable and aligned well with our product’s look and feel—exactly what we want from OEM software. It met nearly all of our functional requirements and was straightforward to adapt into our existing environment.
cons: Our engineering team noted that the documentation could be more extensive to support deeper self-service and faster onboarding. While this wasn’t a blocker, having more examples and usage details would be helpful. That said, the Bryntum team was very accessible and quick to respond to our questions, which helped offset the documentation gaps during our initial implementation.

review_title: Great tool - very bad use/pricing model for internal company use
description: Seemed good at first (tech support, sales), however - once we purchased the recommended license (i.e. license recommended at the outset of our testing period), the sales person insisted we needed to purchase the license that was 3x more expensive. This would have eliminated the tool as a viable solution - so we have wasted several months and lots of developer time getting their tool integrated.
author: Craig M.
pros: Ease of use (both from a development and end-user perspective)
cons: No true pricing model for internal company use.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Great Component Suite for Almost any Application
description: Overall, we are very satisfied with the Bryntum components and we found many functions that other comparable suits do not offer. Especially the way you can configure and customize the Task Board and Scheduler Pro for us is decisive.
author: Markus M.
pros: The Bryntum suite is providing a very rich set of components with a huge amount of functionality. The code quality is high and written according to the latest standards. Documentation is extensive. The suite is frequently updated with new features.
cons: The learning curve can be steep depending on what you want to achieve. Sometimes the components do more than you actually need.

review_title: Bryntum Gantt + Scheduler Pro, great tools for demanding clients
description: We started application development with another component that did not fully meet the needs of our clients, as it has some limitations in performance and scalability. Change was needed and Bryntum Gantt + Scheduler Pro came just in time to quickly replace initial component. What we got with Bryntum Gantt and Scheduler Pro are robust, high performant components that offer a clear visual representation of tasks, dependencies, and timelines together with insights into resource availability and workload. Both components, with their rich set of features are significantly improving and accelerating our development process.
author: Hrvoje K.
pros: Performant. Rich set of features especially resource management. Flexible. Visually pleasing.
cons: At the moment we have no issues at all.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: A Comprehensive Review of Bryntum's Powerful Scheduling Features
description: Bryntum is a great tool for scheduling tasks and managing projects. The interface is intuitive and the features are powerful and customizable. The cost may be prohibitive for some users, but the features more than make up for the price.
author: Metin U.
pros: Bryntum is an incredibly powerful tool when it comes to scheduling tasks. It is highly customizable and allows users to create complex schedules with ease. The interface is intuitive and easy to navigate, making it easy to set up and manage tasks. The visual timeline feature is especially useful for quickly seeing how tasks are performing.
cons: While Bryntum is a great tool for scheduling tasks, it can be a bit expensive for some users. Additionally, the dashboard could be improved to provide more detailed information about tasks and to give users more control over customization.

review_title: A powerful, high-performance Gantt chart
description: Bryntum makes our SARA AI production scheduling system look professional and easy to use. It turns complex data into something our users can easily understand. It’s helped us deliver a top-tier experience to our customers.
author: Hank C.
pros: Honestly, it’s super fast. Even when we’re dealing with thousands of tasks, the scrolling and dragging still very smooth. Also, it’s flexible so we could customize to make it works perfectly with our AI production scheduling applications for SME manufacturers.
cons: The biggest challenge is the learning curve. It has several modules that take some time to figure out how everything works. It’s also not the cheapest option but we think it’s worth the investment.

review_title: Powerful Gantt, but UI Integration Is Challenging
description: I see great value in what Bryntum Gantt offers in terms of capabilities and performance. However, integrating it into our product’s interface required more work than expected. That said, once integrated, it has greatly enhanced the experience for users who need advanced planning tools.
author: Carolina E.
pros: The Gantt component is feature-rich, highly customizable, and offers a professional user experience. It allowed us to deliver advanced project planning functionality without building it from the ground up.
cons: Integrating the Gantt into our existing interface has been challenging. Adapting the look and feel to match our UI took significant effort, and aligning it with our UX standards wasn’t straightforward.

review_title: Great library for implementing Work Order planner
description: Our overall experience with Bryntum components has been extremely positive. Scheduler Pro has enabled us to provide our users with clear, structured planning and a detailed historical overview of all activities. Users particularly value the ability to maintain a transparent view of upcoming plans alongside an accurate record of past events.
author: Stanko C.
pros: Intuitive, user-friendly interface that is quickly adopted by users. Stable, high-performance components, reliable even with large datasets. Comprehensive support for planning and historical tracking.
cons: Not so straight forward to upgrade the version. No significant drawbacks have been observed to date.

review_title: Ease of use with Bryntum
description: It's been a great experience with using Bryntum. They keep their communications strong with product update emails and allow you to adopt the latest and greatest without much effort.
author: Raheel J.
pros: Adopting Bryntum into our product was effortless. They are quick to respond to any of our questions and have great customer service. It's a great tool for anyone looking to build around project management and it's easy to customize as you wish.
cons: There isn't much here that I can think of. The only item that comes to mind is the difference in time zones between our companies. But even then, the support forum is a great starting point for any support that's needed.

review_title: Ottima esperienza, strumento affidabile
description: Nel complesso la mia esperienza è stata positiva. È uno strumento affidabile che aiuta a gestire attività e progetti in modo più organizzato. Lo consiglierei a chi cerca una soluzione semplice ma efficace.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Mi è piaciuta la semplicità d’uso e la chiarezza dell’interfaccia. È uno strumento intuitivo che permette di organizzare il lavoro in modo efficace e veloce.
cons: All’inizio serve un po’ di tempo per prendere confidenza con tutte le funzionalità, ma una volta capito il funzionamento diventa molto pratico.

review_title: Solid calendar solution with responsive support
description: We used Bryntum to build calendar features for our customers and were impressed by how quickly we got up and running. The team was responsive and helpful when we had questions. It saved us a ton of development time and made the product feel polished.
author: Mark W.
pros: Fast to integrate into our app and had all the key features we needed to launch a polished calendar and scheduling experience.
cons: Documentation could be clearer, and some customization was harder than expected. Would have been nice if we had more control of the components.

review_title: Custom Gantt
author: Alessandro R.
pros: A good product for Project Management We analyzed several solutions before choosing Bryntum, among all of them its potential and customization stood out.
cons: Integrating Gantt into our interfaces was challenging and took a lot of time. In addition to the forum and guides, initial support for integrations would be necessary

review_title: Streamlining Scheduling with Bryntum’s Scheduler Pro
description: Our overall experience with Bryntum has been highly positive. Their Scheduler Pro provided a robust foundation for our Job Timeline feature, enabling us to offer a real-time, visual scheduling solution to our customers. The integration was smooth, thanks in large part to Bryntum’s high-performance components and dedicated support. Their product was essential in helping us deliver an efficient and intuitive scheduling tool without sacrificing speed or usability
author: David B.
pros: What I liked most about Bryntum is their Scheduler Pro’s flexibility and advanced features. The drag-and-drop functionality made scheduling adjustments seamless, while their support for resource grouping and customizable time scales allowed us to adapt the timeline view to meet the specific needs of our operations. The product’s ability to handle complex task dependencies efficiently was also a major advantage, simplifying the coordination of multiple technicians’ schedules.
cons: What I liked least was that the learning curve for some of the more advanced customization features took a bit of time to navigate. While the tool is highly powerful, figuring out all the intricate functionalities required some initial setup and adjustments.

review_title: Looking forward to do more Bryntum implementations for our clients
description: We are a consultancy firm and we decided to go with SchedulerPro from Bryntum for a use case at one of our clients, and I was very impressed how well it works and how mature a product it is. With limited experience in front end development, we could implement our use case and with full integration with the Power Platform within a couple of weeks, using only Bryntum documentation and looking at the forum posts and replies from the Bryntum team.
author: Anders B.
pros: The responsiveness of the control, how well it is thought out in terms of all the events that you just can tap into for validation, styling and contextual menus. The ease of integration with the Power Platform.
cons: The documentation is generally really good, but we were a bit overwhelmed in terms of options for loading data: CrudManager, Project, loading from URL, to inline data. In all fairness, many options here is a necessity to integrate the control in a way that fits with the rest of the platform you are building the component into.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Bryntum review Jan24
description: In general, the experience with Bryntum has been good, it made a complicated task easier for us, such as visualizing shifts and activities, in addition to being able to make movements
author: Antonio R.
pros: The gantt and the ease of distributing elements between objects
cons: The lack of clarity in the official documentation

review_title: A great ExtJS tool for our School Management Application
description: Easy to deal with; understood our needs and responsive service.
author: Brett T.
pros: The framework itself is easy to code, it is fast and very reliable. The company offer great after sales support.
cons: Upgrading from major version numbers requires some coding/rework but this is more a function of ExtJS itself than the tool.

review_title: Excellent Gantt Chart Module
description: Excellent. Friendly team that actually listens and are very responsive.
author: Nadeem M.
pros: We reviewed several Gantt charting modules but this one came tops due to its fluid drag and drop functionality and general ease of use. The developers found the support to be excellent.
cons: None so far. To date, everything has been really good.

review_title: Bryntum scheduler
description: We use Bryntum Scheduler for visualisation of scheduling tasks in a web application for climate management within building facilities. It was quite easy to integrate Bryntum scheduler in out web app and provide rich UX for custom schedules of the buildings' climate control systems.
author: Pavel P.
pros: - high quality UI components for scheduling tasks - useful API - integration with popular UI frameworks and libraries incl. Angular, React and Vue - extensibility - well-developed options for customization of components
cons: Quite heavy standard 'Store/Model' core for managing state of the schedule tasks, which could be difficult to integrate or customize if needed.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Bryntum Scheduler
description: This has been a very useful product since it covers a lot of functionality I had to support.
author: Jari M.
pros: There are lots of options possible that you can also configure in different ways. The default look and feel is already really nice. It's possible to use different themes.
cons: It took some time to configure the component correctly to my needs and to find my way in the extensive API (but the support is really helpful and quick responding).

review_title: Bryntum Gantt has saved us time and money
description: By using a third party product for this feature set we have saved time and money. The support team has been great in helping us implement the product and answer our questions.
author: Joanne R.
pros: Feature rich product with little effort to turn things on and off once you know how to. Easier for the user to use than MS Project.
cons: Takes a little to understand the integration and implementation of the product but once you do it's gold!

review_title: Great company and product
author: Marcel S.
pros: Great product and service provides everything we need.
cons: Nothing yet, so far so good, we do not see any issues.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Great product
author: Rodrigo G.
pros: The integration of Bryntum Gantt with my software generated a very good final solution to our customers. The final result looks very professional and well integrated. All the other options I found had an amateur look compared to this one.
cons: As I started using this tool a very long time ago, sometimes was a little hard to find other people's talking about some topics that could help me during implementation.

review_title: Bryntum
author: Joe S.
pros: It has so many features and easy to use. We integrated and got a prototype working is weeks not months.
cons: No cons at this time. We are in the prototyping phase.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Gantt Review
description: Overall, I had a positive experience with Ext Gantt because of the ease of the software.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: I liked that this software makes it really easy to organize all events and projects in an orderly fashion.
cons: What I least liked about this software was that if I wanted to switch dates or times of the events, it would mess up other parts of my chart.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial
